name: Beetroot Poriyal
tagline: Tamil-style coconut beet stir-fry — folate, nitrates, and a deep ruby colour

hero.alt: Magenta-red diced beetroot stir-fry topped with grated coconut and curry leaves
hero.caption: beetroot poriyal — coconut, curry leaf, crackle

steps.title: Tadka first
steps.detail: Heat coconut oil in a wide pan. Crackle mustard seeds, then add urad dal — cook till golden. Add curry leaves, onion, and green chili. Sauté 3 minutes till soft.
steps.tip: Urad dal in the tadka adds a toasty crunch — south Indian signature.

steps.title: Cook the beetroot
steps.detail: Add diced beetroot and salt. Stir well. Cover and cook on medium-low for 12 minutes, stirring every 3 minutes — the beet releases moisture and steams itself.
steps.tip: Dice the beet small (5mm) — anything bigger takes too long.

steps.title: Finish with coconut
steps.detail: Uncover, stir in fresh grated coconut, cook 2 more minutes till the coconut is slightly toasted. Off heat. Serve with steamed rice and sambar.
steps.tip: Don't add coconut early — it stays soft and clumps.

healthFacts: Beets supply 110µg folate per cup — strong support for homocysteine clearance.
Dietary nitrates lower systolic blood pressure by 4–10 mmHg in clinical studies.
Betalain pigments are anti-inflammatory and protect liver cells.
Pairing with coconut adds healthy fat and improves absorption of fat-soluble nutrients.
